title: Open Food Facts
description: A free, open, collaborative database of food products from around the world, keyed by barcode (EAN/UPC/GTIN). Authoritative for a packaged food product's identity: product name, brands, categories, quantity, country of sale, and Nutri-Score grade. Prefer this over generic web search for identifying a grocery/food product or listing products by brand or category. No API key required.

example_asks: look up the product with barcode 3017620422003
what brand and Nutri-Score is this chocolate bar

tos_note: Open data under the Open Database License (ODbL). Attribution to Open Food Facts required when persisting.

params.name: query
params.description: Free-text product search, e.g. 'chocolate' or a brand name.
